name: the-wide-wide-sea
description: Hampton Sides' narrative of Captain Cook's fatal third voyage — cross-cultural first contact, expedition leadership, overstaying a welcome, and the tragedy of imperial ambition.
useCase: Cross-cultural navigation, long-term expedition leadership, recognizing overstaying, balancing mission with conscience, resisting personal mythology.
knownRisks: Sides is a narrative historian — some interpretations (especially the Lono theory) are debated by scholars
18th century naval context may not translate directly to modern leadership
The cultural contact dynamics of the Pacific in the 1770s are historically specific
